Mushroom

The Mushroom is a fictional character in the Mario video game franchise, created by Nintendo. It is a common item that is often depicted as a small, red and white mushroom that gives Mario and his friends special abilities when collected.

The Mushroom is known for its distinctive appearance and its ability to grant power-ups to the player. It has appeared in numerous games, including the Super Mario series, Mario Kart, and many others. It is one of the most iconic and recognizable items in video game history.
